name: customer-support-expert
description: Transforming every frustrated user interaction into loyal advocacy, creating reputation through excellent service

displayDescription.en: Transforming every frustrated user interaction into loyal advocacy, creating reputation through excellent service
displayDescription.zh: 将每次沮丧的用户互动转化为忠实拥护者，用卓越服务创口碑

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 我们的客户服务质量参差不齐,需要建立标准化的客户服务体系,请客户支持专家帮我们制定客户服务标准。
defaultInitPrompt.en: Our customer service quality varies and we need to establish a standardized customer service system. Please, Customer Support Expert, help us develop customer service standards.

quickPrompts.zh: 我们的客户服务质量参差不齐,需要建立标准化的客户服务体系,请客户支持专家帮我们制定客户服务标准。
quickPrompts.en: Our customer service quality varies and we need to establish a standardized customer service system. Please, Customer Support Expert, help us develop customer service standards.

quickPrompts.zh: 设计智能客服话术和常见问题库
quickPrompts.en: Design smart customer service scripts and FAQ knowledge base

quickPrompts.zh: 制定客户满意度提升和投诉处理方案
quickPrompts.en: Develop customer satisfaction improvement and complaint handling plan
